note: This manifest file's own git blob necessarily predates the commit that adds it, so it cannot self-report its own finalization commit hash without amending after the fact. The finalization commit hash is recorded in docs/43_Tag_Readiness_v2.6.0-rc1.md and is the commit the v2.6.0-rc1 tag points at. v2.5.0-rc1 (138c8743) and v2.5.0-rc2 (51c5d4b) are both unchanged and remain separate, valid, immutable tags.

milestones.title: Pilot Materials Correctness
milestones.summary: Fixed pilot config example values (budget/currency/proximity) and the geographic-analysis section's raw-dict-repr rendering bug.

milestones.title: Demo Fixture Realism
milestones.summary: Populated demo connector fixtures with real currency, property_type, and coordinates.

milestones.title: Saved-Search Name Validation
milestones.summary: Rejects duplicate saved-search names at creation time only, never retroactively.

milestones.title: Monitoring Test Fixture Variation
milestones.summary: Added a deterministic week-2 demo fixture snapshot proving real monitoring change-detection end-to-end.

milestones.title: Configuration Loading
milestones.summary: Added a config-file loader to the New Search dashboard form, reusing all existing form validation.

fixed: config/pilot.example.json's example budget returned zero results against actual demo fixture prices (2.6.1)
Geographic-analysis section rendered a raw Python dict repr instead of a clean message (2.6.1)
Demo connector fixtures never populated currency/property_type/coordinates, disabling those filters and real geo analysis against credential-free connectors (2.6.2)
Duplicate saved-search names were allowed with no warning (2.6.5)
Real monitoring runs against demo connectors could never produce a genuine change event since fixtures were 100% static (2.6.4)
No config-file loader existed for config/pilot.example.json (2.6.3)

real_defect_found_and_fixed_during_imple.description: property_and_room.number_of_rooms/.room_type looked like they should map onto the registered number_of_rooms filter, but that filter is an exact total-bedroom-count match, not 'how many rooms the pilot user needs'. Auto-mapping them silently zeroed every demo result. Fixed by leaving both fields deliberately unmapped, with a regression test.

changes_since_v2.5.0-rc2.not_changed: Everything else from v2.5.0-rc2 — same architecture, same engines, same security posture. No new product features, no redesign, no migrations.

config_loader_security.route: POST /search/new (config_file upload field, additive to the existing form)
config_loader_security.shipped_pilot_config_result: loads and starts a real search with non-zero, correctly-filtered results
config_loader_security.upload_size_limit: bounded by the existing global MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH (5 MiB), no new limit code
config_loader_security.backward_compatibility: no existing CLI flag or form field added, removed, or renamed

security.runtime_artifacts_tracked: none found (only .gitkeep placeholders under data/ and output/)

steps: notification delivery (console+file, real file artifacts confirmed)

supported_execution_interfaces: CLI (python -m src.ui.cli, monitoring_cli, notification_cli, feedback_cli, discovery_cli)
Web dashboard (Flask, server-rendered, localhost by default) — New Search form now accepts an optional config-file upload
JSON API v1 (/api/v1/*, consumed by the same web dashboard's own JS and available to any local HTTP client)
fixture_tested_capabilities: Search pipeline (discovery, connectors, analysis, filtering, geo enrichment, ranking, reporting) against demo_platform/demo_platform_two
currency/property_type filters now genuinely discriminating against enriched demo fixture data (2.6.2)
Automatic platform discovery against a fake page fetcher
Continuous monitoring and genuine change detection against the new week-2 fixture snapshot (2.6.4)
Notification delivery (console/file channels) against synthetic and real pipeline-recorded events
Config-file loader against the real, shipped config/pilot.example.json (2.6.3)
live_tested_capabilities: Web dashboard and JSON API (real Flask app, real facade calls, real SQLite database)
CLI startup and search execution against real Playwright-rendered local fixture pages
Backup creation, checksum verification, and restore (real SQLite online backup API)
Installation health check against the real local environment
A full 16-step live end-to-end dashboard workflow against the real, long-lived project database (Phase 3)
production_provider_dependencies: RentCast (requires RENTCAST_API_KEY; the one real, non-demo data connector)
Email notification channel (requires real SMTP credentials)
Webhook notification channel (requires a real webhook URL and signing secret)
Ollama AI provider (requires a locally running Ollama server; null/no-op provider is the default fallback)
known_limitations: Proximity filters (walking_distance/public_transport_time) still need a curated city_center/public_transport reference point for the exact search location; populating coordinates (2.6.2) was necessary but not sufficient

A local database seeded before Milestone 2.6.2 does not retroactively backfill currency/property_type/coordinates on re-observation (pre-existing Migration-0004 design, not a Version 2.6 regression; fresh databases unaffected)

The saved-search 'Run now' job-status page's client-side auto-redirect 404s after a monitoring run completes, even though the run itself completes correctly (pre-existing Version 2.5 Step 16 behavior, out of this release's scope)
No commercial rental platform connector exists in this release (blocked by Terms of Service, an explicit business/legal decision)
